sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101107" key="sunumenaio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνῠμεναιόω</orth>, <sense id="n101107.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in the bridal hymn</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.138b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
